name: node-backend
description: Backend for Node iOS app -- Vercel API for APNs push fan-out + static legal pages. Supabase Edge Functions live in supabase/functions/ and deploy via supabase CLI.

scripts.supabase:functions:deploy:all: supabase functions deploy apple-exchange-code && supabase functions deploy apple-revoke && supabase functions deploy delete-user-data && supabase functions deploy cloudinary-sign && supabase functions deploy report-intake
